description: Lock Quarantine & Public Health Measures to civic disease-control inspection, port quarantine, bills of health, and maritime detention rather than herbal treatment or battlefield medicine.

checks.reason: Herbal preparation is treatment context and must not carry the source-backed quarantine administration scope.
Battlefield care must not be restored as the port-quarantine and civic isolation prerequisite.
The source-backed scope uses organized public-health inspection, isolation, and disease-control oversight.
Public health inspection enables quarantine administration but is not a single mechanical hard prerequisite.
Bills of health, ship declarations, and vessel detention need the maritime-law and port-regulation context.
Maritime law enables port quarantine rules without making the edge a required engineering dependency.
The node remains anchored to the 1377 Dubrovnik/Ragusa quarantine rule.
